response.original_title: Why Can’t I Take My Money Out of Robinhood? (: 1-863-338-2360)
response.overview: If you’re unable to withdraw money from Robinhood, it is usually due to settlement rules or account restrictions (: 1-863-338-2360)  Even after selling assets, funds are not always immediately available for withdrawal (: 1-863-338-2360)  Robinhood follows standard banking and clearing timelines before allowing transfers (: 1-863-338-2360)  1. Funds Are Still in Settlement (: 1-863-338-2360)  After selling stocks or crypto, trades must fully settle first (: 1-863-338-2360)  Stock settlements usually take 1–2 business days (T+2 rule) (: 1-863-338-2360)  During this time, the money appears in your account but cannot be withdrawn (: 1-863-338-2360)
response.title: Why Can’t I Take My Money Out of Robinhood? (: 1-863-338-2360)
